Container.Name: HELLEDGER
Container.Overview: HELLEDGER is a self-hosted, privacy-first household finance tracker. All data stays on your server in a local SQLite database — no cloud, no subscriptions.[br][br] [b]Features:[/b][br] [b]Transactions[/b] — Income and expense tracking with categories, accounts, and recurring entries[br] [b]Accounts[/b] — Multiple bank accounts per household[br] [b]Budget[/b] — Expected vs. actual comparison (Soll/Ist) per category and month[br] [b]Year View[/b] — Full-year category x month breakdown at a glance[br] [b]Month View[/b] — Detailed monthly Soll/Ist comparison with variance and savings rate[br] [b]Net Worth[/b] — Snapshot tracking of total assets and liabilities over time[br] [b]Excel Import/Export[/b] — Bulk transaction import and export to XLSX[br] [b]Backups[/b] — Automated scheduled backups[br] [b]Admin Panel[/b] — SMTP email notifications, OIDC single sign-on (Authentik, Keycloak), user management, registration control[br] [b]Multi-Household[/b] — Separate financial spaces; users can belong to multiple households[br] [b]PWA[/b] — Installable on desktop and mobile, works offline[br] [b]i18n[/b] — German (default) and English, per-user language preference[br] [b]Dark/Light Mode[/b] — Manual toggle[br][br] [b]Documentation:[/b] https://github.com/Kreuzbube88/helledger/tree/main/docs

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the HELLEDGER web interface

Config.Name: SECRET_KEY
Config.Description: Required: random secret for session encryption. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: DATABASE_PATH
Config.Description: Path to SQLite database file inside the container

Config.Name: BACKUP_INTERVAL_HOURS
Config.Description: Hours between automatic backups (0 to disable)
